texto: Just as we may, through an appalled realization that we were unaware of what was going on in the mind of one we thought we knew, come to wonder how we ever know what another person is thinking or feeling, so too we may, having on some occasion wanted badly to understand and having clearly failed, come to wonder how we ever manage to understand, and how we know that we have succeeded.
explicacao: Citação de Patrick Wilson sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Just as we may, through an appalled realization that we were unaware of what was going on in the …” articula reflexao, cognitive, communication em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como communication e connections.

frase_original: Just as we may, through an appalled realization that we were unaware of what was going on in the mind of one we thought we knew, come to wonder how we ever know what another person is thinking or feeling, so too we may, having on some occasion wanted badly to understand and having clearly failed, come to wonder how we ever manage to understand, and how we know that we have succeeded.

texto: With actors like Steve McQueen, Paul Newman and Harrison Ford, what made them such icons is that even in dramatic movies, their characters had a sense of humor.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Patrick Wilson: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a humor. O trecho “With actors like Steve McQueen, Paul Newman and Harrison Ford, what made them such icons is that …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que humor, movies, sense-of-humor pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de sense-of-humor.
